name: Yeti-Switch API
description: Yeti-Switch is a Session Border Controller (SBC) for VoIP interconnection. It provides two JSONAPI-compliant REST APIs: an Admin API for configuration and provisioning, and a Customer API for end-user access to rates, CDRs, and account information. This spec covers the Admin API. All requests and responses use the JSONAPI specification (application/vnd.api+json).
